overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence following a large bird of prey flying through a mountainous landscape. The bird soars over dense pine forests, passes through a rustic wooden village with a water wheel, navigates a rocky canyon with waterfalls, and ascends to snow-covered mountain peaks under a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain valley with distant village

agents.ego_description: large bird of prey gliding over forested valley toward distant settlement

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance
dense evergreen trees covering the valley slopes
winding stream cutting through the valley floor
unpaved path winding through the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a wide aerial view of a lush mountain valley. The bird flies over dense pine forests and grassy terrain, with a distant mountain range visible under a clear blue sky. A river canyon cuts through the center of the valley as the bird approaches a small village in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden mountain village with water wheel

events.description: entering wooden village area with traditional buildings and water structures

agents.ego_description: flying low over the village, passing between wooden buildings and over the central stream

entered.detail: cluster of traditional wooden buildings with shingled roofs
large wooden water wheel attached to a building by the stream
covered wooden bridge spanning the stream
clear flowing water running through the village center

segments.scene_description: The bird descends into a rustic wooden mountain village, flying between traditional timber buildings with shingled roofs. A prominent water wheel turns slowly on the left side, while a covered wooden bridge spans the central stream. The village is nestled in a valley clearing surrounded by rocky outcrops.

events.description: exiting village and entering narrow rocky canyon with steep walls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the canyon following the winding stream

entered.detail: steep rock walls forming a narrow gorge
cascading water falling down the canyon rocks
tall rock faces rising on both sides of the canyon

segments.scene_description: Leaving the village behind, the bird enters a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliffs rising on both sides. The stream continues through the canyon center, with a small waterfall visible in the distance. The vegetation becomes sparse as the terrain becomes more rugged and enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep rocky gorge ascending toward peaks

events.description: gaining altitude while navigating between steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: climbing higher through the canyon with increasing elevation toward the mountain peaks

entered.detail: patches of snow appearing on the rocky slopes
vertical rock faces closing in on both sides

segments.scene_description: The bird continues ascending through the steep canyon, gaining elevation as the rock walls rise higher. Patches of snow begin to appear on the rocky slopes, indicating the increasing altitude. The stream becomes narrower as the terrain becomes more rugged and vertical.

events.description: terrain transitions to snow-covered rocky peaks at high altitude

agents.ego_description: reaching the snowy mountain peak and flying along the rocky ridge

entered.detail: rocky summit covered in white snow
jagged mountain peaks against the blue sky

segments.scene_description: The bird emerges from the canyon onto a wide, snow-covered mountain summit. The terrain is now blanketed in white snow with exposed rocky outcrops. The camera follows the bird as it soars along the ridge line, with expansive views of the surrounding mountain range under bright sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial journey that begins in a lush mountain valley and ascends to a frozen, sunlit summit. It begins with a wide glide over dense pine forests and grassy terrain, following a river canyon toward a distant settlement. As the bird descends, the landscape shifts into a rustic wooden village characterized by timber buildings, a turning water wheel, and a covered bridge. The scene then narrows as the camera enters a rugged rocky canyon with steep cliffs and sparse vegetation, gradually gaining altitude as patches of snow appear on the vertical slopes. Finally, the bird emerges from the enclosed canyon onto a wide, snow-covered mountain ridge, soaring across a white expanse under bright sunlight with expansive views of the surrounding range.
